title: Search episodes 25 and 26
wikitext:
[]: Search episodes 25' & 26'             Quote Post by Kmeuh » Mon Mar 14, 2016 6:08 am Hi everyone. Does anybody has episodes 25' & 26' of the series? http://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Episode ... Evangelion I desperately search but I never found. I want so much look the "jikai" of episode 26' especially.

[]: Re: Search episodes 25' & 26'             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Mar 14, 2016 9:13 am I know I have those versions on the Japanese Blu-ray set . I'm not sure of it's also on the Japanese DVD set that was released simultaneously. I don't think those versions ever had an English release, and were sold only in Japan for a time. I can't seem to find any individual copies of them on CD Japan's website, so they might be out of print outside of the all-encompassing Blu-ray set.

[]: Re: Search episodes 25' & 26'             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Mar 15, 2016 12:28 am Hah! Nearly 8 years on the site and I find out only now that this release even existed.

[]: Re: Search episodes 25' & 26'             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Mar 15, 2016 8:53 am ^ Evangelion is a story of repetition.

[]: Re: Search episodes 25' & 26'             Quote Post by Dima » Tue Mar 15, 2016 2:07 pm Monk Ed wrote: Hah! Nearly 8 years on the site and I find out only now that this release even existed.
